value:
Ayush Shakya is a skilled AI/ML engineer with hands-on experience in developing production-grade AI systems. He specializes in fine-tuning large language models using LoRA and SFT, building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines with FAISS and Pinecone, and creating LangChain-based agent workflows. Currently pursuing a B.Tech in Computer Science from GLA University, he demonstrates strong technical expertise in generative AI and large language models.  

Skills: Large Language Models, Fine-tuning, LoRA, SFT, Retrieval-Augmented Generation, FAISS, Pinecone, LangChain, AI Systems Development
